title: Erythrocyte Sedimentation Rate (ESR): MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
) 
Heart failure 
Certain kidney and liver problems 
If your ESR results are not normal, it doesn't always mean you have a medical condition that needs treatment. Normal ESR levels will vary, depending on your age and sex. Also, pregnancy , your menstrual cycle , aging, obesity , drinking alcohol regularly, and exercise can affect ESR results. Â Certain medicines and supplements Â may also affect your results, so be sure to tell your provider about any medicines or supplements you are taking.
Learn more about laboratory tests, reference ranges, and understanding results .
Is there anything else I need to know about an ESR? 
Because an ESR can't diagnose a specific disease, your provider may order other tests at the same time. Also, it's possible to have a condition that causes inflammation and still have a normal ESR result. A C-reactive protein (CRP) test Â is commonly done with an ESR to provide more information.
